name: Dacast Video Streaming Platform API
what_it_does: Professional video streaming platform with REST API — enabling broadcasters, businesses, and content creators to stream live video and host VOD content with paywall/monetization, white-label player, CDN delivery, password protection, and API-driven content and channel management, without the complexity of building streaming infrastructure.
use_cases: Managing live channels and streams via Dacast API for automated broadcast workflow
Uploading and organizing VOD content via Dacast API for video library management
Configuring paywall and subscription access via Dacast API for monetization automation
Querying Dacast video analytics and viewer metrics via API for engagement reporting
Managing Dacast channel and stream settings via API for multi-event production workflows
not_for: Developer-first video infrastructure (use Mux for developer-grade API)
Free video hosting at scale (Dacast targets professional/business users with paid plans)
Social video platforms (Dacast is for controlled, professional video distribution)
best_when: A broadcaster, sports league, church, or business needs a complete video streaming platform with paywall, white-label player, and live + VOD support — without building streaming infrastructure from scratch.
avoid_when: You need developer-first API (use Mux), free hosting at scale, or advanced video encoding customization.

auth.notes: API key from Dacast account settings. x-auth-token header authentication. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API key provides full account access. Webhook for stream events (start, stop, viewer events). REST API for content and channel management. White-label player embed API. No SDK — REST API only.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $39/month (1TB bandwidth); Event $63/month; Scale $165/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2010 by Stephane Roulland. Raised $8M. Acquired Limelight Networks' streaming platform. B2B-focused streaming platform. Strong in: churches/religious organizations, sports, education, corporate training. White-label player for custom branding. Paywall: Subscription, Pay-per-view, Free. CDN via Akamai and proprietary network. 150+ countries reach. Multi-bitrate adaptive streaming. Chinese streaming (limited). Popular with churches (60K+ religious organizations use Dacast). Live + VOD in unified platform.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for content and channel management. x-auth-token header auth. Webhook for stream events. Credit card required. No SDK. Documentation moderate quality. Bandwidth limits by plan rather than API rate limits. Business-focused platform — less developer-centric than Mux or api.video.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Content reads idempotent by ID. Channel reads idempotent. Upload status reads idempotent. Content creation not idempotent — check by name. Stream start/stop operations idempotent for same state.
known_agent_gotchas: x-auth-token header auth — non-standard auth pattern vs Bearer token
Bandwidth limits by plan — monitor usage to avoid overage charges
Live stream management requires understanding Dacast's channel/stream model
Paywall configuration requires separate API calls for access rules
Credit card required — no free trial without payment method

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. x-auth-token header auth. No OAuth2 or scope granularity. Paywall with token-based viewer authentication. CDN-delivered via Akamai. Video content processed through Dacast infrastructure. No compliance certifications documented. Password-protected content for private streams. Geo-blocking available for content restriction.
